infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: B.CLEAN needs your location to show nearby customers and provide navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: B.CLEAN needs your location to track job locations and provide real-time updates.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: B.CLEAN needs camera access to capture before/after photos of completed jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: B.CLEAN needs photo library access to save and manage job photos.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: B.CLEAN needs calendar access to sync job schedules with your calendar.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: B.CLEAN needs contacts access to quickly add customer information.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: B.CLEAN uses this to deliver relevant ads that help keep the app affordable.
